integer not null, cart_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, product_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) 2026-04-28T04:09:44.084+05:30 DEBUG 16328 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table carts ( created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, user_id bigint not null unique, primary key (id) ) 2026-04-28T04:09:44.090+05:30 DEBUG 16328 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table deliveries ( agent_id bigint, created_at timestamp(6) not null, customer_id bigint not null, delivered_at timestamp(6), order_id bigint not null, picked_up_at timestamp(6), customer_district varchar(50) not null, tracking_number varchar(50) not null unique, delivery_address TEXT not null, id CHAR(36) not null, notes TEXT, status enum ('ASSIGNED','DELIVERED','FAILED','OUT_FOR_DELIVERY','PENDING','RETURNED') not null, primary key (id) ) 2026-04-28T04:09:44.097+05:30 DEBUG 16328 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table delivery_assignments ( agent_id bigint not null, assigned_at timestamp(6) not null, responded_at timestamp(6), delivery_id CHAR(36) not null, id CHAR(36) not null, rejection_reason TEXT, status enum ('ACCEPTED','PENDING','REJECTED') not null, primary key (id) ) 2026-04-28T04:09:44.104+05:30 DEBUG 16328 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table delivery_status_history ( changed_at timestamp(6) not null, changed_by bigint, delivery_id CHAR(36) not null, id CHAR(36) not null, status enum ('ASSIGNED','DELIVERED','FAILED','OUT_FOR_DELIVERY','PENDING','RETURNED') not null, primary key (id) ) 2026-04-28T04:09:44.106+05:30 DEBUG 16328 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table email_verification_tokens ( expiry_date timestamp(6) with time zone not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, user_id bigint not null, token varchar(256) not null unique, token_type enum ('EMAIL_VERIFICATION','OAUTH','PASSWORD_RESET'), primary key (id) ) 2026-04-28T04:09:44.110+05:30 DEBUG 16328 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table failure_logs ( attempt_number integer not null, logged_at timestamp(6) not null, logged_by bigint not null, reason_code varchar(50) not null, delivery_id CHAR(36) not null, description TEXT, id CHAR(36) not null, primary key (id) ) 2026-04-28T04:09:44.118+05:30 DEBUG 16328 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table login_audits ( id bigint generated by default as identity, login_time timestamp(6), user_id bigint not null, ip_address varchar(255), user_agent varchar(255), primary key (id) ) 2026-04-28T04:09:44.124+05:30 DEBUG 16328 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table orders ( amount float(53) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, user_id bigint, first_name varchar(255), last_name varchar(255), payment_method varchar(255), payment_status varchar(255), phone varchar(255), product varchar(255), status varchar(255), primary key (id) ) 2026-04-28T04:09:44.126+05:30 DEBUG 16328 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table partnership_applications ( created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, reviewed_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6) not null, address_line1 varchar(255), business_address varchar(255), business_name varchar(255), business_reg_number varchar(255), city varchar(255), contact_person_name varchar(255), district varchar(255), email varchar(255) not null, full_name varchar(255) not null, nic varchar(255), phone_number varchar(255), postal_code varchar(255), product_category varchar(255), product_details TEXT, province varchar(255), review_note TEXT, tin_number varchar(255), applicant_type enum ('DELIVERY','SUPPLIER') not null, status enum ('APPROVED','PENDING','REJECTED') not null, primary key (id) ) 2026-04-28T04:09:44.134+05:30 DEBUG 16328 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table password_reset_tokens ( expiry_date timestamp(6) with time zone not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, user_id bigint not null, token varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id) ) 2026-04-28T04:09:44.138+05:30 DEBUG 16328 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table payments ( amount float(53), order_id bigint, payment_date timestamp(6), payment_id bigint generated by default as identity, payment_method varchar(255), status varchar(255), transaction_id varchar(255), primary key (payment_id) ) 2026-04-28T04:09:44.145+05:30 DEBUG 16328 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table products ( cost_price numeric(10,2), expiry_date date, low_stock_threshold integer not null check (low_stock_threshold>=1), manufacture_date date, price numeric(10,2) not null, stock_quantity integer not null check (stock_quantity>=0), created_at timestamp(6), product_id bigint generated by default as identity, supplier_id bigint not null, updated_at timestamp(6), barcode varchar(50) unique, image_content_type varchar(50), unit varchar(50), brand varchar(100) not null, country_of_origin varchar(100), shade varchar(100), skin_type varchar(100), sku varchar(100) unique, volume varchar(100), name varchar(200) not null, description TEXT, ingredients TEXT, tags TEXT, usage_instructions TEXT, category enum ('BEAUTY_TOOLS','BODYCARE','COSMETICS','FRAGRANCE','HAIRCARE','SKINCARE') not null, image LONGBLOB, status enum ('ACTIVE','DISCONTINUED','INACTIVE') not null, primary key (product_id) ) 2026-04-28T04:09:44.177+05:30 DEBUG 16328 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table return_requests ( agent_id bigint, completed_at timestamp(6), customer_id bigint not null, requested_at timestamp(6) not null, reason_code varchar(50) not null, delivery_id CHAR(36) not null, description TEXT, id CHAR(36) not null, status enum ('APPROVED','CANCELLED','COMPLETED','PICKED_UP','PICKUP_SCHEDULED','REJECTED','REQUESTED') not null, primary key (id) ) 2026-04-28T04:09:44.193+05:30 DEBUG 16328 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table statics_partnership_applications ( id bigint generated by default as identity, reviewed_at timestamp(6), reviewed_by_id bigint, submitted_at timestamp(6), user_id bigint, admin_remarks varchar(1000), description varchar(1000), business_address varchar(255) not null, business_name varchar(255) not null, business_registration_number varchar(255), contact_person_name varchar(255) not null, email varchar(255) not null, fleet_size varchar(255), phone_number varchar(255) not null, product_category varchar(255), service_areas varchar(255), application_type enum ('DELIVERY_PARTNERSHIP','SUPPLIER_PARTNERSHIP') not null, status enum ('APPROVED','CANCELLED','PENDING','REJECTED','UNDER_REVIEW'), primary key (id) ) 2026-04-28T04:09:44.202+05:30 DEBUG 16328 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table suppliers ( created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, user_id bigint unique, address varchar(500) not null, business_address varchar(255), company_name varchar(255) not null, contact_person varchar(255) not null, email varchar(255) not null unique, phone varchar(255) not null, status enum ('APPROVED','PENDING','REJECTED') not null, primary key (id) ) 2026-04-28T04:09:44.209+05:30 DEBUG 16328 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table user_profiles ( created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6), user_id bigint not null unique, address varchar(255), city varchar(255), country varchar(255), phone_number varchar(255), primary key (id) ) 2026-04-28T04:09:44.218+05:30 varchar(150) not null, address_line_1 varchar(255), address_line_2 varchar(255), city varchar(255), first_name varchar(255), last_name varchar(255), password varchar(255), password_hash varchar(255)
